description: Adversarial invariants for GitHub issues #69-#72: broad automobile, modern clean rooms, modern containerization, and high-speed rail should keep source-backed chronology and scope.

checks.reason: The broad automobile node is scoped to the Benz Patent-Motorwagen practical motorcar, not postwar mass motorization.
Assembly-line production belongs on mass-produced automobiles, not the broad 1886 automobile concept.
The clean_rooms node is scoped to Whitfield-style laminar-flow clean rooms at Sandia.
The 1958 integrated-circuit demonstration cannot depend on the later 1960 laminar-flow cleanroom node.
The 1959 planar process should not require later Whitfield-style clean rooms.
Modern commercial container shipping is anchored to the Ideal X voyage.
The scoped modern intermodal freight node is anchored to containerized truck-ship movement.
Agribusiness should not be forced to postdate container shipping; containerization is only one later logistics accelerant.
Modern high-speed rail is anchored to the 1964 Tokaido Shinkansen.
Modern high-speed passenger rail should explicitly model railway signaling/control as a core dependency.
